title: Senior/Vessel Manager
description:
Profile description

We are looking for Senior Vessel Manager for a position based in Singapore.


Job Responsibilities:

  • As a Senior Vessel Manager, you will assume full responsibility for the safe operation of a fleet of bulk carrier and Gas vessels assigned to you.
  • Besides day-to-day close monitoring of vessels, you will be required to supervise drydockings and repairs, carry out vessel inspections, conduct technical investigations, ensure certification and documentation of vessels under your charge are up to date and meet international safety standards.
  • To monitor and control spare parts supply to the vessels. You will judiciously manage budgets allocated to vessels and produce regular reports.
  • You will attend vessels at port and/or short sailing on scheduled visits and prepare vessel inspection reports. You need to drive safe work culture and inspire the shipboard team.
  • To objectively analyze and report on performance of shipboard personnel.
  • Coordinate with Operations, QHSE and Fleet Personnel department in smooth & efficient operation of assigned vessels.
  • Any other assignments as needed.


Requirements:

  • Chief Engineer's Certificate of Competency and more than 3 years of shore experience in Technical management.
  • Experience on Bulk and Gas Carriers is desirable.
  • You should have a strong focus on cargo handling equipment & knowledge of cargo gear maintenance requirement.
  • Good leadership qualities & strong commitment to safety/compliance procedures are essentially needed in our organization.
  • You should be professionally sound, highly motivated and a good team player.
  • Good proficiency in English communication required.
  • You will be stationed in Singapore and travelling to attend ships.

postedCompany.description: The Anglo-Eastern Group has been established in the mid 80s with a primary focus on the provision of Ship Management, Crew Management and New Building Consultancy services to third parties worldwide. Anglo-Eastern has a pool of over 14,000 professional crewmembers and over 1,000 full-time qualified shore-based staff positioned globally to assist owners with their needs.
postedCompany.name: ANGLO-EASTERN MARITIME SERVICES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
